title: RoseStacker
description: A mob, item, spawner, and block stacking plugin!
body:
![](https://imgur.com/yE3T5KT.png)

  ![](https://imgur.com/MPZOC0Q.png) **RoseStacker** is a versatile **stacking plugin** created to **stack entities**, **items**, **blocks**, and **spawners**! This plugin is ideal for servers looking to enhance functionality and overall server experience, with features that improve the elements of your **gameplay**. ![](https://imgur.com/fPiEcyd.png)     ![](https://imgur.com/1kdnDJy.png) **RoseStacker** is packed with features and has seen many added in its lifetime. We've designed it to include everything a top-tier stacker plugin should have. Check out some of its features: - **Stack and unstack mobs** under certain conditions. - **Kill mobs** in entire stacks at a time, a few at a time, or individually. - **Accurate** loot and experience drops. - **Disable AI** for mobs. - Have access to **admin tools** that can help debug the plugin. - **Stack blocks** with a built-in GUI. - Complete and total **spawner stacking and handling**; silk touch spawners and control how they behave. - Customize spawner **spawning conditions**. - A built-in **spawner GUI** to show you exactly how your spawner is functioning. - Commands to **translate** the plugin to your choice of language.     ![](https://imgur.com/mwz147C.png) Here are *some* of the features **in action**!

    ![](https://imgur.com/wUufwBX.png) To learn about the **commands and permissions** of **RoseStacker**, [check out our **wiki**](https://wiki.rosewooddev.io/RoseStacker/introduction/)!  

    ![](https://imgur.com/VNxgt6I.png) If you need any **help**, have found a **bug**, or you have any **questions**, please [join our **Discord** server](https://discord.gg/MgUsTBK)! We offer all support through our server. Feel free to use the **question channels** to talk and ask questions!  

    ![](https://imgur.com/OJ75iHT.png) A **big thanks** to everyone who supports us and uses our plugins! A lot of time and love goes into them. If you like this plugin, [check out our other **plugins**](https://modrinth.com/organization/rosewood-development)! If you want to give us some **extra support**, we would be absolutely grateful if you considered [subscribing to our **Patreon**](https://www.patreon.com/RosewoodDevelopment)!
